prompt:

Create a 16:9 blog thumbnail for article "ProcessGroup 与 NCCL 通信路径梳理". NO text.

Style: Brush-painted, atmospheric, low contrast, suggests "constellation of nodes connected across distance". Same warm parchment-green background.

Color HEX: ink black #1a1d1c, mist grey #3a4540, paper warm #2a3128, cyan #9CF0BD, gold #C0A35D.
